content: @Miguel Ojeda Are you pushing for this merge window? If so you probably need to be hurry because it is likely to open next week. :-)

I am considering doing a quick round with the required cleanups etc.; and I discussed it with @Wedson Almeida Filho a few days ago, yeah. Still not 100% sure, since that in itself could look like we are trying to push things... We will see! And yeah, no worries, I am aware of the timings :) -- thanks for the reminder!
